list.name: agent_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT agent_name FROM agent_telemetry ORDER BY agent_name
list.label: Agent

targets.rawSql: SELECT agent_name, SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost FROM agent_telemetry WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY' GROUP BY agent_name ORDER BY total_cost DESC

panels.title: Token usage over time by model

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) as time, model, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) as tokens FROM agent_telemetry WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, model ORDER BY time
SELECT agent_name, AVG(eval_score) as avg_score FROM agent_telemetry WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY' AND eval_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY agent_name
SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) as time, operation, percentile_approx(duration_ms, 0.95) as p95 FROM agent_telemetry GROUP BY time, operation ORDER BY time
SELECT agent_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN tool_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as error_rate FROM agent_telemetry WHERE operation = 'tool_call' GROUP BY agent_name
SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) as time, AVG(prompt_size_bytes) as avg_prompt, AVG(completion_size_bytes) as avg_completion FROM agent_telemetry GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT trace_id, agent_name, COUNT(*) as spans, SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost, AVG(eval_score) as avg_score, MAX(prompt_size_bytes + completion_size_bytes) as max_span_bytes, MAX(ts) as last_seen FROM agent_telemetry WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY' GROUP BY trace_id, agent_name ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT span_id, parent_span_id, operation, agent_name, model, tool_name, duration_ms, input_tokens + output_tokens as tokens, cost_usd, prompt_size_bytes + completion_size_bytes as span_bytes, eval_score, ts FROM agent_telemetry WHERE trace_id = '$trace_id' ORDER BY ts

SELECT trace_id, span_id, agent_name, start_time, prompt_preview, completion_preview, eval_score FROM agent_telemetry WHERE MATCH_ALL(prompt, '$search_term') OR MATCH_ALL(completion, '$search_term') ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 50
